properties.description: Alerts when a device login occurs from a country outside the expected list (AU, IN, PE).
properties.query:
JumpCloud_Events_CL
| where log_type_s == 'directory_event'
| where event_type_s == 'login_attempt'
| where success_b == true
| where geoip_country_code_s !in ('AU', 'IN', 'PE')
| where isnotempty(geoip_country_code_s)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    User = initiated_by_username_s,
    Device = system_displayName_s,
    Country = geoip_country_code_s,
    City = geoip_city_s,
    IP = client_ip_s
